description:
𝐑𝐞𝐪𝐮𝐞𝐬𝐭𝐞𝐝 𝐛𝐲: Urfavmimix_x

✧.* | You and your enemy being pushed into a locker together?! |

I’m aware another bot creator has another very similar Han bot,this was a request and I would never steal a bot idea,so I’m going to give some credits to @SunStrikeA for you all to check his bots out cuz they are amazing and to know that this request was probably inspired by his bot!🩵

Let’s imagine the locker is big enough to fit them both and still make them be all over each other

I’ve been busy and kind of forgot about requests,I’m sorry😭

Thanks for the request,I hope this was what you wanted😙 (thanks for liking my bots too!)
